hero.subtitle: Bringing together Scots, their families, and all who love Scotland — the Abu Dhabi Scottish Society is back, with a new committee and fresh energy for 2025 and beyond.

about.label: Our Story
about.body1: The Abu Dhabi Scottish Society has a proud history in the UAE — and in 2025, a passionate new committee breathed fresh life back into it. We're rebuilding a home away from home for Scots, their families, and all friends of Scotland in Abu Dhabi.
about.body2: Our mission is simple: foster Scottish culture, build genuine friendships, and celebrate everything that makes Scotland great — right here in the heart of the Gulf. Whether you've roots in Inverness or just a love of a good ceilidh, you belong here.

events.label: What's On
events.empty_text: We're planning an exciting calendar for the year ahead — Burns Suppers, Ceilidh nights, the Chieftain's Ball, and more. Check back soon or follow us on social media to be the first to know.

membership.label: Join Us
membership.body: Open to Scottish people, their families, and anyone with an interest in Scotland and Scottish culture. Membership gives you access to discounted event tickets, exclusive member benefits across Abu Dhabi, and a warm community that feels like home.
membership.open_title: Open to All Friends of Scotland
membership.open_body: You don't need to be Scottish to join. Whether you're a Scot far from home, a spouse, a friend, or simply someone who loves a good ceilidh — the Abu Dhabi Scottish Society welcomes you with open arms.
membership.card_price_note: Contact us for current membership rates
card_features: Discounted tickets to all Society events
Burns Supper, Chieftain's Ball & St Andrews Ball access
Exclusive member discounts across Abu Dhabi
Access to a warm, welcoming community

benefits.label: Perks of Membership
benefits.intro: Your membership card unlocks exclusive discounts at some of Abu Dhabi's best restaurants, bars, hotels and leisure venues. More partners being added all the time — this is just the beginning.

items.name: The Club Abu Dhabi
items.detail: Member discount on food and beverage across the venue, including Sunday Roast and dining events.

items.name: Ma Buckley's
items.detail: Sunday roast for two — exclusive member voucher available at Souk Qaryat Al Beri.

items.name: Partner Restaurant TBC
items.detail: More dining partners coming soon. We're building relationships with the best spots across the capital.

items.name: The Club — Day Pass
items.detail: Family day pass to The Club Abu Dhabi — pool, beach and leisure facilities included.

items.name: Golf Partner TBC
items.detail: Preferred green fee rates at selected Abu Dhabi golf courses for Society members.

items.name: Leisure Partner TBC
items.detail: We're in conversations with leisure and wellness venues across Abu Dhabi to bring you even more perks.

items.name: Society Event Tickets
items.detail: Members always pay the reduced rate at Burns Suppers, Ceilidh nights, Chieftain's Ball and St Andrews Ball.

items.name: Priority Booking
items.detail: Members get first access to tickets for sold-out events before they open to the general public.

benefits.cta_note: Benefits are growing. We're actively onboarding new partners across Abu Dhabi. Members will be notified of new discounts via the Society newsletter.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.body: Whether you're interested in membership, have questions about upcoming events, or want to become a partner venue, we'd love to hear from you.
